# Allways — Agent Quickstart

> Universal transaction layer for trustless peer to peer swaps on Bittensor Subnet 7.
> This document is optimized for LLM ingestion. Read it top to bottom — by the
> end you will be able to query rates, initiate swaps, and watch live state
> without further help.

## What Allways is

Allways (SN7) runs a permissionless on-chain orderbook of miners quoting
real exchange rates between BTC and TAO (more pairs coming). Users initiate
swaps on-chain; miners post collateral that gets slashed if they fail to
deliver. There is no custodian, no wrapped asset, and no bridge token. The
contract guarantees every swap either completes or refunds.

## Swap lifecycle

1. **Quote.** Each miner publishes `(sourceChain, destChain, rate,
   counterRate, collateralRao)` on-chain. The API exposes this as
   `GET /miners`. Best rate wins.
2. **Initiate.** User picks a miner and submits an InitiateSwap extrinsic
   referencing that miner's hotkey, the source amount, and a deadline block.
   Miner collateral is locked.
3. **Fulfill.** Miner sends the destination asset to the user's destination
   address and posts proof. Status: ACTIVE → FULFILLED.
4. **Complete.** User confirms receipt (or validators confirm via on-chain
   proof). Status: FULFILLED → COMPLETED. Collateral unlocks.
5. **Timeout / refund.** If the miner fails before the timeout block, swap
   moves to TIMED_OUT and the user receives slashed TAO from miner
   collateral via `alw claim`.

## CLI quickstart

Install (Python ≥ 3.10):

    pip install allways-cli

Common commands:

    alw rates                                                    # live orderbook
    alw quote --from BTC --to TAO --amount 0.01                  # best rate
    alw swap initiate --miner <uid> --from BTC --amount 0.01 --to-address <addr>
    alw swap status <swap-id>
    alw claim <swap-id>                                          # refund timed-out swap

Wallet setup uses standard Bittensor wallet conventions (`btcli wallet
new_coldkey`). Hotkey funds gas; coldkey holds positions.

## API reference

Base URL: `https://api.all-ways.io` (production), `https://test-api.all-ways.io` (testnet).

| Method | Path                    | Purpose                                                  |
|--------|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| GET    | /stats                  | Global counters: totalSwaps, totalVolumeTao, activeMiners, activeSwaps |
| GET    | /miners                 | Live miner commitments (rate, collateral, status)        |
| GET    | /miners/{hotkey}        | A single miner by hotkey                                 |
| GET    | /swaps                  | All swaps (paginated via limit/offset, searchable)       |
| GET    | /swaps/active           | Currently active swaps (ACTIVE | FULFILLED)              |
| GET    | /swaps/{swapId}         | A single swap + its event timeline                       |
| GET    | /events/latest          | Recent contract events (filterable)                      |
| GET    | /events                 | Filtered events (eventType, blockFrom, blockTo, ...)     |
| GET    | /sse                    | Server-Sent Events stream (event, miner, swap channels)  |
| GET    | /llms.txt               | This document, served as static markdown                 |

TypeScript shapes (mirrored from the UI):

    type Miner = {
      uid: number; hotkey: string;
      sourceChain: string | null; destChain: string | null;
      rate: string | null; counterRate: string | null;
      collateralRao: string;
      isActive: boolean; isReserved: boolean; hasActiveSwap: boolean;
      updatedAt: string;
    };

    type DashboardStats = {
      totalSwaps: number; totalVolumeTao: string;
      activeMiners: number; activeSwaps: number;
    };

    type ActiveSwap = {
      swapId: string;
      status: 'ACTIVE' | 'FULFILLED' | 'COMPLETED' | 'TIMED_OUT';
      userAddress: string; minerHotkey: string;
      sourceChain: string; destChain: string;
      sourceAmount: string; destAmount: string; taoAmount: string;
      rate: string;
      // ... tx hashes, blocks, timestamps
    };

## Example agent flows

### Find best BTC→TAO rate

    GET /miners
    -> filter: sourceChain='BTC' AND destChain='TAO' AND isActive AND rate != null
    -> sort by parseFloat(rate) DESC
    -> miners[0] is your target

### Initiate a swap

    1. Re-fetch GET /miners (rates change every block).
    2. CLI: alw swap initiate --miner <uid> --from BTC --amount 0.01 --to-address <tao-addr>
    3. Persist returned swapId.
    4. Poll GET /swaps/{swapId} every 30s OR subscribe to /sse 'swap' channel.
    5. status === 'COMPLETED' → done. status === 'TIMED_OUT' → call alw claim.

### Watch a swap with SSE

    const es = new EventSource('https://api.all-ways.io/sse');
    es.addEventListener('swap', (e) => {
      const swap = JSON.parse(e.data);
      if (swap.swapId === MY_SWAP_ID) updateState(swap);
    });

## Notes for agents

- All amounts are decimal strings (RAO units for collateral, native units
  elsewhere). Parse with arbitrary-precision libraries, not floats.
- Bittensor block time ≈ 12 seconds. `timeoutBlock - initiatedBlock` is the
  swap window in blocks.
- The orderbook is genuinely live; rates change every block. Re-quote
  before initiating.
- Public API is currently unrate-limited. Be a good citizen.
- Sender verification: validators reject any source tx whose on-chain sender
  does not match the source_address proved at reserve time.

## Source of truth

- Repo: https://github.com/entrius/allways
- UI repo: https://github.com/entrius/allways-ui
- Docs: https://docs.all-ways.io/
- Status: https://status.all-ways.io
